The Seoulful

Be yourself — that is the most universal.

View Menu
Seoulful food × Seoulful mood

Fresh Baked Goodness to Feed Your Soul

Welcome to Richmond's cozy spot for premium Korean baking. From golden-crusted Salted Butter Breads to spicy chewy Tteokbokki and velvety specialty lattes — everything prepared with love and fresh authentic ingredients.

View Full Menu
Behind The Scenes

Baked Fresh Daily

Baking at The Seoulful is a labor of love. Every batch of our salted butter bread, every kimbap roll, and every strawberry farm latte reflects our commitment to authenticity and cozy warmth — using premium butter and traditional techniques inspired directly by the cafes of Seoul.

Behind the bake

"Authentic taste of Seoul, love it!"

— Joy G.

"So good — comes with lots of cheese!"

— Simona L.

"Tastes just like Korea. Please support local businesses."

— Amy K.
